About Me

Kathmandu, Nepal

I'm a System Engineer with experience supporting and managing enterprise IT infrastructure across corporate offices, INGOs, and service-based environments.

My work spans systems administration, network operations, virtualisation, monitoring, and security. Equally comfortable on Windows and Linux platforms, with hands-on exposure to banking-grade security tools, firewall management, backup systems, and monitoring solutions.

I thrive in structured, policy-driven environments — coordinating with vendors and stakeholders to maintain high system availability, data protection, and operational reliability.
